heading: Report of completion; superintendent of battlefield
label: 423h Report of completion; superintendent of battlefield
text: Upon completion of the acquisition of the land and the work of the commission, the Secretary of the Interior shall render a report thereon to Congress, and thereafter the battlefield shall be placed in charge of a superintendent at a salary to be fixed by the Secretary of the Interior and paid out of the appropriation available for the maintenance of the battlefield.
notes: Change of Name“Battlefield” substituted in text for “park” in view of redesignation of Petersburg National Military Park as Petersburg National Military Battlefield by . See .Pub. L. 87–603section 423h–1 of this title
Transfer of FunctionsTransfer of administrative functions of park, see note set out under .section 423 of this title
